title: What's new in 6.4.0 RELEASE?
description: Exotelcraft for Minecraft 26.1 is here! Fabric and NeoForge are now unified into a single jar for easier installation. The 25w14craftmine content is now complete, plus added new Exotelcraft wood shelves and more Bedrock UI components. Includes Lithium compatibility and a bunch of important bug fixes!
